column3: "Aloe Vera heals burns" refers to its ability to relieve pain and speed up recovery for skin injuries, particularly burns.
"Aloe Vera soothes skin irritation" refers to its ability to reduce redness, itchiness, and inflammation on the skin due to various causes such as burns, sunburn, or other irritants.
"Aloe Vera reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to alleviate swelling and pain caused by irritated or injured tissues.

"Aloe Vera promotes wound healing" refers to its ability to accelerate and facilitate skin restoration for various cuts, burns, or abrasions, as it contains natural compounds that boost collagen production and promote cell regeneration in affected areas.

"Aloe Vera eases digestive problems" refers to its ability to help improve the functioning of the gastrointestinal system, alleviating issues like bloating and constipation which generally hinder proper digestion.
"Aloe Vera relieves constipation" refers to its ability to alleviate difficulties related to bowel movements by soothing and softening stools.
"Aloe Vera boosts immunity" refers to its capability of enhancing the body's natural defense system, which makes it better able to fight off illnesses and promote overall health.
"Aloe Vera treats heartburn" refers to its use as a natural remedy for relieving acid reflux and reducing the burning sensation often caused by stomach issues.

"Aloe Vera helps with oral health" refers to its ability to soothe, moisturize and maintain hydration of gums, thus aiding in preventing various gum-related issues such as inflammations and infections.
"Aloe Vera detoxifies body" refers to its ability to aid in removing harmful substances and improving overall health by promoting natural healing.
